message:
fix(node): state machine guards, wrapping_add consistency, and catch-all elimination

- quarantine: enforce_quarantine only from Initiated/Propagated (prevent state regression)
- quarantine: trigger_recall requires Isolated state (prevent recall from wrong lifecycle phase)
- quarantine: record_recall_receipt requires RecallTriggered state
- sdk_integration: wrapping_add(1) → saturating_add(1) for sequence counter consistency
- intent_firewall: replace _ => {} catch-all with explicit Allow|Deny arms for exhaustiveness
- Updated 2 tests to advance quarantine through full lifecycle before recall

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
